title: Kashchei the Immortal
actors: Sergey Stolyarov, Aleksandr Shirshov, Galina Grigoreva
plot: An epic tale filmed during the Second World War. Russian heroes Nikita Kozhemyaka and Bulat Balagur save the Russian land from the enemy hordes of Kashchei the Immortal and free the beautiful Marya Morevna.
